title: Naukri Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Naukri Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Naukri Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Pimpri-Chinchwad-based team.

About Naukri Digital Technologies:
Naukri Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Naukri Digital Technologies!
